docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, HA MANH NGUYEN, HUNG MANH AS TO DEFENDANT POOLE, JEROME DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-10-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-13-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-21-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-10-1996, CONTINUED TO MAR-11-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY 3/1/96. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFENDANT OF NEW DATE, IF NECESSARY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
